main_event: Civilian in Fayetteville observed two bright white/red flickering lights for 35 minutes on 6 February 1968, concluded probable aircraft.
sighted_object: bright white light changing to flickering red light; later joined by second red light
witness_description: civilian male age 33, outdoors in business section, plus one corroborating witness
interesting_points: First object: bright white light, changed to flickering red, stationary ~15 minutes, then bright again, then flickering red
Second red light appeared ~15 seconds later, both stationary ~1 minute, second moved NE and disappeared
First light then moved East, becoming bright white again, then appeared to travel at high rate of speed
Observer estimated speed 125 MPH and distance 2 miles at first sight
Object size: entire object covered by match head at arm's length
Proximity to Grannis Municipal Airfield, Simmons Army Airfield, and Pope AFB led to aircraft conclusion
Second witness corroborated sighting from parking area
Reported 6 Feb 1968 to Major Harwood USAF Pope AFB
